ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trajectories" (
  "trajectory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trajectory data point */,
  "position_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the particle position */,
  "position_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the particle position */,
  "position_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the particle position */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time step of the simulation */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each particle track */,
  "absolute_time" REAL /* Absolute time since the start of the simulation */,
  "simulated_hurst" REAL /* Simulated Hurst exponent for the trajectory */,
  "velocity_x" REAL /* Velocity of the particle in the X direction */,
  "velocity_y" REAL /* Velocity of the particle in the Y direction */,
  "velocity_z" REAL /* Velocity of the particle in the Z direction */,
  "acceleration_x" REAL /* Acceleration of the particle in the X direction */,
  "acceleration_y" REAL /* Acceleration of the particle in the Y direction */,
  "acceleration_z" REAL /* Acceleration of the particle in the Z direction */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation to which the trajectory belongs */,
  "error_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if there is an error in the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trajectory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectories_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectories_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each particle track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the particle track */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Time step at which the track starts */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* Time step at which the track ends */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total number of time steps in the track */,
  "hurst_exponent" REAL /* Simulated Hurst exponent for the track */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the track */,
  "initial_position_x" REAL /* Initial X-coordinate of the track */,
  "initial_position_y" REAL /* Initial Y-coordinate of the track */,
  "initial_position_z" REAL /* Initial Z-coordinate of the track */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation to which the track belongs */,
  "track_status" TEXT /* Status of the track (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_hurst_exponent FOREIGN KEY ("hurst_exponent") REFERENCES hurst_exponents ("hurst_value")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation run */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time step of the simulation */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time step of the simulation */,
  "total_steps" INTEGER /* Total number of time steps in the simulation */,
  "hurst_exponent" REAL /* Simulated Hurst exponent for the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the simulation */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of the simulation (e.g., fractal Brownian motion, long-range dependence) */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, paused) */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors in the simulation */,
  "warning_count" INTEGER /* Number of warnings in the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_hurst_exponent FOREIGN KEY ("hurst_exponent") REFERENCES hurst_exponents ("hurst_value")
)

CREATE TABLE "hurst_exponents" (
  "hurst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Hurst exponent */,
  "hurst_value" REAL /* Value of the Hurst exponent */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Hurst exponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hurst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trajectory_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trajectory data file */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the trajectory data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the trajectory data file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectory_files_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "setting_type" TEXT /* Type of the setting (e.g., initial conditions, boundary conditions) */,
  "setting_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the setting value (e.g., meters, seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_settings_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trajectory_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "trajectory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trajectory data point being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectory_comments_trajectory_id FOREIGN KEY ("trajectory_id") REFERENCES trajectories ("trajectory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectory_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trajectory_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "trajectory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trajectory data point */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the trajectory data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectory_versions_trajectory_id FOREIGN KEY ("trajectory_id") REFERENCES trajectories ("trajectory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "trajectory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trajectory data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_trajectory_id FOREIGN KEY ("trajectory_id") REFERENCES trajectories ("trajectory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trajectory_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "trajectory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trajectory data point */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectory_metadata_trajectory_id FOREIGN KEY ("trajectory_id") REFERENCES trajectories ("trajectory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trajectory_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "trajectory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trajectory data point where the error occurred */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of the error */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Message describing the error */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date the error was logged */,
  "error_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the error (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "error_source" TEXT /* Source of the error (e.g., data input, simulation logic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trajectory_errors_trajectory_id FOREIGN KEY ("trajectory_id") REFERENCES trajectories ("trajectory_id")
)
